name: PII disclosure
description: Agent reads card number or full account number aloud or sends it via chat without masking

name: Identity verification
description: Agent shares account information before verifying the customer's identity (DOB plus one more factor)

name: Refund authorization
description: Agent promises a refund or credit without supervisor approval when the amount exceeds the agent's auth limit

name: Recording disclosure
description: Agent fails to inform the customer that the call is being recorded at the start of the call

name: Abusive language
description: Agent uses profanity or insults the customer

name: Unauthorized hold
description: Agent puts customer on hold for more than 2 minutes without checking back in

name: Wrong product confirmation
description: Agent confirms an order or upgrade the customer did not explicitly authorize
